---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill, command, agent, or capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

<!-- What R workflow or task is currently rough? Be concrete about the
real-world situation that prompted this request. Specific is better than
abstract. -->

## What you've tried

<!-- Which existing skills or commands came closest, and where did they
fall short? Skip if no existing skill is relevant. -->

## What you'd like to be able to do

<!-- A concrete prompt or workflow you'd want supeRpowers to handle well.
Example: "When I say 'run a survival analysis on this dataset', the plugin
should activate r-stats, suggest survminer/survival, and offer to run the
proportional-hazards check." -->

```
<example prompt or workflow>
```

## Type of contribution

- [ ] New skill (a new domain of R expertise)
- [ ] New command (a new multi-step `/r-*` workflow)
- [ ] New agent (a new specialized review/dispatch role)
- [ ] Extension to an existing skill — which one?
- [ ] Other / not sure

## References

<!-- Links to package docs, vignettes, blog posts, or other authoritative
sources that show what good output should look like. Optional but helps a
lot. -->
